ValidationRule.description: Only Legal can edit Code Type
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED( Code_Type__c ), NOT($Profile.Name = 'System Administrator'), NOT($Profile.Name = 'Carmignac - System Administrator'), NOT($Profile.Name = 'Carmignac - Legal and Compliance'), NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only Legal can edit a Code Type
